arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes interesting point to those criticising Thomas Tuchel's England appointment
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has come out in support of England's controversial decision to appoint German coach Thomas Tuchel as Gareth Southgate's permanent successor. "I understand opinions and the feelings but that's a responsibility for the FA to say that the first filter is only English managers, or whether it's any manager from any country, and to select the best in the moment that we are in right now," Arsenal's Spanish coach reasoned ahead of his side's trip to Bournemouth on the weekend.

arts.ttl: Arsenal favourite set to leave for exciting coaching role
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has confirmed Under-18 manager Jack Wilshere has a decision to make on his future as he enters into talks with Norwich City. A move is expected to be finalised imminently, although Arteta suggested Wilshere's final decision has not yet been made.

arts.ttl: Ben White sets record straight on infamous claim about him - 'I just want to forget!'
arts.sum: A Sky Sports interview with White went viral shortly after he joined Arsenal from Brighton in 2021, with supporters left aghast when he claimed that he wasn't really a football fan

arts.ttl: Ben White sets record straight over whether he ‘hates’ football
arts.sum: Arsenal star White has previously made headlines for suggesting he never watches football once he leaves the training ground

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief fires cheeky Declan Rice transfer dig amid Arsenal admission
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Max Eberl has poked fun at Thomas Tuchel's failed pursuit of Arsenal star Declan Rice . This week, former Chelsea manager Tuchel was unveiled as England's manager which will see Rice play under the German tactician - nearly two years after he pushed for his services at club level.

arts.ttl: ‘Amazing’: Ben White says Arsenal have a ‘scary’ player who doesn’t get the credit he deserves
arts.sum: There has been a lot of talk about Arsenal’s incredible defence this season. The Gunners have been solid at the back, and many of their...

arts.ttl: Coach says US star Tyler Adams is ready for Bournemouth return
arts.sum: Bournemouth midfielder Tyler Adams remains on track to make his season debut against Arsenal in the Premier League on Saturday. Adams was limited to three Premier League games last season because of a hamstring injury that sidelined him from Sept.

arts.ttl: Risk-taking and high-pressing: Iraola's Bournemouth transformation explained
arts.sum: This time last season, Bournemouth sat 19th in the Premier League without a win in seven games. It is a measure of how far they have come under Andoni Iraola that, despite being five points and six places better off, the prevailing mood is one of frustration.

arts.ttl: When Mikel Arteta can unleash dream Arsenal midfield amid huge injury update - Tom Canton
arts.sum: Arteta was later pressed by a different reporter on whether in the next seven games, the gap between now and the next international break, he could feature. Speaking ahead of the game against Bournemouth this coming weekend he said: “I think he’s not going to be fit for this game.

arts.ttl: 'A different story': Chris Sutton makes bold result prediction for Bournemouth v Arsenal clash tomorrow
arts.sum: Arsenal will be raring to go on their return to Premier League action following the international break, with a trip to Bournemouth on the cards....
